allow: PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysqld.exe" -ArgumentList "--defaults-file=C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\my.ini","--bootstrap","--user=root" -RedirectStandardInput "C:\\xampp\\tmp\\bootstrap_fix.sql" -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\xampp\\tmp\\bootstrap_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\xampp\\tmp\\bootstrap_err.txt" -Wait -PassThru; Write-Host "Exit code: $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content "C:\\xampp\\tmp\\bootstrap_err.txt" | Select-Object -Last 10)
